label: 建筑生成
description: 完整建筑生成管线：对区域掩码列表依次执行建筑雕刻、外墙轮廓提取、BSP内墙生成、外门/内门开凿、开窗、室内地面按房间拆分，输出含外墙/大门/内门/窗户/室内地面的单值网格列表及名称清单。
description-en: Full building generation pipeline: applies carving, wall outline extraction, BSP inner walls, door placement (outer and inner), window placement, and indoor floor splitting by room. Outputs labeled single-value grid lists with walls, doors, windows, and per-room indoor floors.
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。俯视建筑平面图，白色/浅灰背景，深色外墙轮廓勾勒矩形建筑，内部有细线内墙分隔成多个房间，墙上有小缺口表示门和窗，整体构图简洁，主色深灰与浅蓝，突出「建筑平面」的设计感。

inputs.name: gridList
inputs.label: 建筑区域列表
inputs.description: 建筑地块掩码列表（每项非零单元格视为建筑可用区域），也可传入单个网格
inputs.description-en: List of building plot masks (non-zero cells treated as valid building area), or a single grid.

inputs.name: wallThickness
inputs.label: 外墙厚度
inputs.description: 外墙轮廓的向内厚度（格数），最小值1
inputs.description-en: Inward thickness of the outer wall outline in cells (minimum 1).

inputs.name: innerWallDensity
inputs.label: 内墙密度
inputs.description: BSP内墙的密度，0=无内墙，1=最大分割深度（6层），值域[0,1]
inputs.description-en: BSP inner wall density: 0 = no inner walls, 1 = maximum split depth (6 levels). Range [0, 1].

inputs.name: doorCount
inputs.label: 外门数量
inputs.description: 每栋建筑的外门（大门）数量，0表示不开外门
inputs.description-en: Number of outer doors (main entrances) per building. 0 = no outer doors.

inputs.name: doorWidth
inputs.label: 外门宽度
inputs.description: 外门的格宽（格数），最小值1
inputs.description-en: Width of outer doors in cells (minimum 1).

inputs.name: windowCount
inputs.label: 窗户数量
inputs.description: 每栋建筑的窗户数量（内外两侧均为空格的外墙格才能开窗），0表示不开窗
inputs.description-en: Number of windows per building (only outer wall cells with empty neighbors on both sides qualify). 0 = no windows.

inputs.name: windowWidth
inputs.label: 窗户宽度
inputs.description: 窗户的格宽（格数），最小值1

inputs.name: buildingHeight
inputs.label: 建筑高度
inputs.description: 建筑的格高（H）。大于0时，将外墙与窗户合并后整体向上平移H行，作为墙顶层额外输出；0表示不生成墙顶
inputs.description-en: Building height in cells (H). When > 0, the combined outer-wall + window mask is shifted upward by H rows and output as a "墙顶" (wall-top) layer. 0 = no wall-top output.

inputs.name: windowRandom
inputs.label: 窗户随机布局
inputs.description: 开启后窗户随机分布；关闭后均匀分布在墙体上
inputs.description-en: When enabled, windows are placed randomly. When disabled, they are distributed evenly along the wall.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间戳

inputs.name: mergeOutput
inputs.label: 输出合并
inputs.description: 开启后将所有建筑的同类语义层合并输出：所有建筑的外墙合为一张、大门合为一张、内门合为一张、窗户合为一张、室内地面合为一张，清单条目减少；关闭后每栋建筑独立输出分层网格
inputs.description-en: When enabled, grids of the same semantic type across all buildings are merged into one (all walls together, all doors together, etc.). When disabled, each building outputs its layers independently.

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 建筑网格列表
outputs.description: 拍平的单值网格列表：每栋建筑输出外墙/大门/内门/窗户/室内各房间网格，每张只含一种语义，其余全0，ID从1起全局递增
outputs.description-en: Flattened single-value grid list: each building outputs wall/outer-door/inner-door/window/per-room indoor grids; each grid contains only one semantic element (others 0), with globally unique IDs starting from 1.

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: 建筑名称清单
outputs.description: 名称清单（与 outputGridList 一一对应），格式 [{id, name, type}]，名称如「建筑1-外墙」「建筑1-大门」「建筑1-室内1」等
outputs.description-en: Name list matching outputGridList one-to-one: [{id, name, type}]; names follow the pattern "建筑1-外墙", "建筑1-大门", "建筑1-室内1", etc.

outputs.name: doorGrid
outputs.label: 大门
outputs.description: 所有建筑大门（外门）合并后的单张网格，大门格值为1，其余为0
outputs.description-en: Single merged grid of all building outer doors; door cells = 1, everything else = 0.
